name: Basic Database Schema
description: User, Post, and Comment entities with relationships

nodes.label: User
nodes.description:
id: UUID PK
username: VARCHAR
email: VARCHAR
created_at: TIMESTAMP

nodes.label: Post
nodes.description:
id: UUID PK
title: VARCHAR
body: TEXT
user_id: UUID FK
created_at: TIMESTAMP

nodes.label: Comment
nodes.description:
id: UUID PK
body: TEXT
user_id: UUID FK
post_id: UUID FK
created_at: TIMESTAMP
